title: Amtech U1950A Plastic D-Handle
features: REPLACEMENT HANDLE: This plastic D-grip handle is a handy replacement for use with spades and forks
DURABLE: It is made from durable plastic
FITS 32mm HANDLES: The D-handle fits any 32mm diameter wooden handle
LOCKING MECHANISM: Safety lock ensures secure storage after use
SMOOTH ACTION: Spring-loaded for easy repeated cutting
description: Product Description Amtech have a fantastic range of essential tools for all your gardening requirements. Great value prices are coupled with a very compelling 3 year product guarantee. So keep your outdoor living area looking great and well maintained for less! Don’t forget to also take advantage of Amtech’s free product advice service – see pack for more details. Please note that Amtech warranty and service terms are only applicable to genuine Amtech products. Safety Warning No
